name: Chocolate Truffles
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Bittersweet chocolate, cut into 1-inch pieces
8 oz Toasted pecans or hazelnuts, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
2. Combine chocolate, heavy cream, and superfine sugar in a heavy medium saucepan.
3. Melt together over low heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon.
4. When chocolate has melted, add butter and continue to stir over low heat until the mixture has thickened slightly (about 5 minutes).
5. Add nuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes longer.
6. Spread hot mixture onto prepared baking pan and set in fridge for 15 minutes or until cool but still pliable.
7. When cool, break off pieces of chocolate and roll them in your hands to form rough 3/4-inch rounds (they should look rough and uneven).
8. Roll the truffles in cocoa powder and refrigerate until serving time.
9. These make great gifts; set them in little paper candy cups and place in a box.
Yield: about 2 dozen truffles
